item.title: After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recoverin…
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.
item.content:encoded:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.

item.title: #🔖暮らし タマネギが２貫にまたがって載っている寿司について考える 1987年東京出身。会社員。ハンバーグやカレーや…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖暮らし
タマネギが２貫にまたがって載っている寿司について考える

1987年東京出身。会社員。ハンバーグやカレーやチキンライスなどが好物なので、舌が子供すぎやしないかと心配になるときがある。だがコーヒーはブラックでも飲める。動画インタビュー 前の記事：準備をして雨宿り ＞ライターwiki 一手目が分からない 回転寿司で、２貫にまたがってトッピングが載っている寿司がある。刻...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖暮らし
タマネギが２貫にまたがって載っている寿司について考える

1987年東京出身。会社員。ハンバーグやカレーやチキンライスなどが好物なので、舌が子供すぎやしないかと心配になるときがある。だがコーヒーはブラックでも飲める。動画インタビュー 前の記事：準備をして雨宿り ＞ライターwiki 一手目が分からない 回転寿司で、２貫にまたがってトッピングが載っている寿司がある。刻...

item.title: In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings that involved a moving vehicle between 2015 and 2021. Over that same time period, public records show ICE agents shooting at least 59 people total and killing at least 23.

Not a single indictment resulted from those incidents.
item.content:encoded:
In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings that involved a moving vehicle between 2015 and 2021. Over that same time period, public records show ICE agents shooting at least 59 people total and killing at least 23.

Not a single indictment resulted from those incidents.

item.title: アポカリプスホテルからヤチヨさんを描きました。 「皆様のお帰りを従業員一同、いつまでもお待ちしております」 ＃ヤチヨさん…

item.title: Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came chargi…
item.author: Stoned Yeti 👽 (@stonedmcyeti.bsky.social)
item.description:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶
item.content:encoded:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶

item.title: トランプ政権、NYタイムズ記者に召喚状 大統領専用機の報道巡り異例圧力 www.nikkei.com/article/D…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
トランプ政権、NYタイムズ記者に召喚状　大統領専用機の報道巡り異例圧力
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

同紙は、カタールから譲り受けた大統領専用機がミサイルへの防御機能を備えていないなどと報道で指摘。

FBIの高官が記事を出さないよう要求したといいます。
item.content:encoded:
トランプ政権、NYタイムズ記者に召喚状　大統領専用機の報道巡り異例圧力
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

同紙は、カタールから譲り受けた大統領専用機がミサイルへの防御機能を備えていないなどと報道で指摘。

FBIの高官が記事を出さないよう要求したといいます。

item.title: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. H…
item.author: Alt National Park Service (@altnps.bsky.social)
item.description: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.
item.content:encoded: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.

item.title: It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatric…
item.author: DR. IRONCLAD, Brunch Democrat (@feclad.bsky.social)
item.description:
It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatrics, no flops, no whining...just playing

It's the women. I'm watching a women's game
item.content:encoded:
It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatrics, no flops, no whining...just playing

It's the women. I'm watching a women's game

item.title: Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing …
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com “If the last five years was abou…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“If the last five years was about sun and wind, the next five are about batteries, and this technology is now moving at extraordinary pace,” the environmentalist Bill McKibben says about the green energy transition on “The Ezra Klein Show.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“If the last five years was about sun and wind, the next five are about batteries, and this technology is now moving at extraordinary pace,” the environmentalist Bill McKibben says about the green energy transition on “The Ezra Klein Show.”

item.title: As mayor of Greater Manchester, Andy Burnham became the “Kin…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
As mayor of Greater Manchester, Andy Burnham became the “King of the North.” Westminster insider Steve Richards explains what kind of prime minister he’ll be with Mishal Husain: bloom.bg/3TrmlL8

📷️: Chris Ratcliffe/Bloomberg
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Did you know cats climb into boxes because tight spaces make…
item.author: For the Love of Missy (@missybbbobtail.bsky.social)
item.description: Did you know cats climb into boxes because tight spaces make them feel safe from predators? Your cat isn't being silly - it's hiding from enemies that stopped existing centuries ago.
item.content:encoded: Did you know cats climb into boxes because tight spaces make them feel safe from predators? Your cat isn't being silly - it's hiding from enemies that stopped existing centuries ago.

item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: Lawyer says men who were riding in van are being pressured to self-deport as footage of incident is reportedly with investigators
item.content:encoded: Lawyer says men who were riding in van are being pressured to self-deport as footage of incident is reportedly with investigators

item.title: How many Irish people have ever experienced the wonder of ol…
item.author: Eoghan Daltun 🌍 (@irishrainforest.bsky.social)
item.description:
How many Irish people have ever experienced the wonder of old-growth natural forest in our own country?

Given that it now covers less than 0.1% (<1/1,000th) of Ireland, likely only a tiny few. What a terribly sad thought.

Allowing surviving remnants to expand naturally should be a *top* priority.
item.content:encoded:
How many Irish people have ever experienced the wonder of old-growth natural forest in our own country?

Given that it now covers less than 0.1% (<1/1,000th) of Ireland, likely only a tiny few. What a terribly sad thought.

Allowing surviving remnants to expand naturally should be a *top* priority.

item.title: Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral sho…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral shock in the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision gutting the Voting Rights Act.

But as the surprise wears off, a sense of isolation has begun to set in among some.

🔗 politi.co/4vSW46T
item.content:encoded:
Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral shock in the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision gutting the Voting Rights Act.

But as the surprise wears off, a sense of isolation has begun to set in among some.

🔗 politi.co/4vSW46T

item.title: On this day in 1980, Terry Fox reached Toronto. He ran with …
item.author: Canadian History Ehx (@cdnhistoryehx.bsky.social)
item.description:
On this day in 1980, Terry Fox reached Toronto. He ran with Darryl Sittler, met Bobby Orr, threw out the first pitch at a Toronto Blue Jays game and raised $100,000.

📸 Dick Darrell

Learn more in my Deep Dive 👇
buff.ly/QqZiNNK
item.content:encoded:
On this day in 1980, Terry Fox reached Toronto. He ran with Darryl Sittler, met Bobby Orr, threw out the first pitch at a Toronto Blue Jays game and raised $100,000.

📸 Dick Darrell

Learn more in my Deep Dive 👇
buff.ly/QqZiNNK

item.title: We have news This is Mac He’s hopefully coming to live wit…
item.author: Franglaise (@franglaise.bsky.social)
item.description:
We have news

This is Mac

He’s hopefully coming to live with us at the end of the month

We went to Montpellier to meet him this morning & think he’ll be happy chez nous

He’s 4
Was living on the streets
Has a broken tail
Bit dip & dazzle
Quite chonky & utterly adorable

Hope Calvin approves
item.content:encoded:
We have news

This is Mac

He’s hopefully coming to live with us at the end of the month

We went to Montpellier to meet him this morning & think he’ll be happy chez nous

He’s 4
Was living on the streets
Has a broken tail
Bit dip & dazzle
Quite chonky & utterly adorable

Hope Calvin approves

item.title: Reminder: Memphis is still “under full-blown occupation” by …

item.description: Reminder: Memphis is still “under full-blown occupation” by ICE. Task force members have reportedly killed at least two people in four days.
